ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-12-2022 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-22-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated April 3, 2018, is admitted to probate. Hansaben Patel is appointed as Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for July 12, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Neves. Not reported.

Off Calendar Mar-16-2021 Continued To Apr-13-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2020 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Howard Olsen appeared by zoom for Petitioner.

The Court stated that its tentative ruling is that the policies are essentially in the Decedent's name with the Decedent as the beneficiary, that they would be presumed separate assets and that it does not know when the policies were purchased. The Court also stated that although the Petitioner is not requesting this, it could only confirm the Wife's community share of one half and that it could not confirm the entire policies. Mr. Olsen stated that the bulk of the estate is already in the trust and that the Petitioner would have to probate these assets. The Court stated that it is not unusual and that the policies are not in the trust. The Petition for Spousal Property is denied. Mr. Olsen stated that he will be filing a petition for probate and that he understands that he is to use the same case number when filing his petition.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
